an1.198:1.1: "Foremost, *bhikkhus*, among my *bhikkhu* disciples who conjure up a mind-made body is Cūḷapanthaka.
an1.199:1.1: … Among those skilled in the turning away of mind [*citta*] is Cūḷapanthaka.
an1.200:1.1: … Among those skilled in the turning away of *saññā* is Mahāpanthaka.
an1.201:1.1: … Among those who dwell in non-conflict is Subhūti.
an1.202:1.1: … Among those worthy of offerings is Subhūti.
an1.203:1.1: … Among those who dwell in the forest is Revata of the Acacia Grove.
an1.204:1.1: … Among those who meditate is Kaṅkhārevata.
an1.205:1.1: … Among those of energetic striving is Soṇa Koḷivisa.
an1.206:1.1: … Among those of beautiful speech is Soṇa Kuṭikaṇṇa.
an1.207:1.1: … Among those who receive gains is Sīvali.
an1.208:1.1: … Among those liberated through faith is Vakkalī."
